checks.detail: Ryzen 7 7700 and B650 Tomahawk WiFi are socket-compatible and supported.
64GB DDR5-5200 is within the expected AM5 memory envelope for 2x32GB.
RM850x covers the modeled 450W peak with comfortable headroom.
RTX 3090 remains within the current Talos NVIDIA extension path.

warnings.detail: Used RTX 3090 listings vary in cooler quality and prior use history.

candidates.notes: Bench-test the used GPU before full deployment.
